name: Way of the Samurai 4
description:
The final days of the Shogunate loom over Japan. Foreign influence grows, and amidst it all, you, a lone Samurai, will decide the fate of Amihama.

Another experimental bot, based off of one of my favourite janky PS3-era videogames. All elements that would risk TOS are changed to be compliant, and events from the game are described loosely so as to allow a mostly canon-compliant first few days. Things can and will go off the rails though, just go along with it!

As always, JLLM is unsuited for scenario bots like this, so please use a proxy! I use Deepseek, which seems to have information on all kinds of topics in its dataset. Let me know how it goes with other providers, however!

The bot will try to follow the events of WOTS4's story to a degree, with events like Kinugawa's arrival and such, but this isn't a guarantee, especially if you go way off the rails.

In any case, have fun, and if this bot piques your interest, please check out Way of the Samurai 4 on Steam! Feel free to also check out my ko-fi and Patreon, though those are more for my art stuff than for my bots.
creator: Issy_Changed_Username_ROFL
